# AI 周刊候选源｜2099-01-04

筛选口径：覆盖模型、Agent、AI infra、AI 编程、安全评测与企业落地；排除融资、营销、工具榜单、纯 prompt 技巧和低信号论文搬运。

候选数量：10
抓取失败源：无

## 1. OpenAI launches hosted tool tracing for production agents

- 来源：OpenAI News
- 分类：agent
- 发布时间：2099-01-03T10:00:00.000Z
- 链接：https://openai.com/news/hosted-tool-tracing
- 摘要证据：OpenAI adds hosted tool tracing, exposing tool call inputs, outputs, errors and latency metadata for production agent workflows.

## 2. Anthropic improves long-context evaluation for coding agents

- 来源：Anthropic News
- 分类：model
- 发布时间：2099-01-03T09:00:00.000Z
- 链接：https://www.anthropic.com/news/long-context-coding-evals
- 摘要证据：Anthropic updates its coding-agent evaluation suite with long-context repository tasks, failure recovery checks and reviewer-facing diagnostics.

## 3. GitHub Copilot ships model routing controls for enterprises

- 来源：GitHub AI
- 分类：coding
- 发布时间：2099-01-02T12:00:00.000Z
- 链接：https://github.blog/ai-and-ml/copilot/model-routing-controls
- 摘要证据：GitHub Copilot adds enterprise policy controls for model routing, allowing administrators to constrain model choices by repository, data sensitivity and cost tier.

## 4. Cloudflare Workers AI adds gateway-level cost attribution

- 来源：Cloudflare AI
- 分类：infra
- 发布时间：2099-01-02T11:00:00.000Z
- 链接：https://blog.cloudflare.com/workers-ai-cost-attribution
- 摘要证据：Cloudflare adds per-tenant cost attribution and request metadata for Workers AI gateway traffic, targeting enterprise governance and chargeback.

- 链接：https://metr.org/blog/agent-autonomy-risk-eval

## 8. LangChain introduces production incident patterns for agents

- 来源：LangChain Blog
- 分类：agent
- 发布时间：2098-12-31T10:00:00.000Z
- 链接：https://blog.langchain.com/agent-incident-patterns
- 摘要证据：LangChain collects production incident patterns for tool-using agents, including runaway loops, stale retrieval, permission failures and silent partial completion.

## 16. GitHub Security Lab publishes prompt-injection triage workflow for coding agents

- 来源：GitHub Security Lab
- 分类：safety
- 发布时间：2098-12-27T09:00:00.000Z
- 链接：https://github.blog/security/prompt-injection-triage-coding-agents
